task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the Odoo Calendar module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible on the screen, indicated by the 'Calendar' heading or active menu item.

task_completion.description: The agent locates the 'Project Phoenix' events, typically by using the search bar or switching to the List view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains 'Project Phoenix' as a filter, or the List view is active and displays the four target events ('Kickoff Meeting', 'Design Review', 'Sprint Planning', 'Stakeholder Update').

task_completion.description: The agent selects the four 'Project Phoenix' events for deletion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes next to the four 'Project Phoenix' events are checked in the list view, or the agent is viewing the events individually to delete them.

task_completion.description: The agent initiates and confirms the deletion of the selected events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Action' dropdown is open with 'Delete' selected, or a deletion confirmation dialog ('Are you sure you want to delete these records?') is visible and being accepted.

task_completion.description: The 'Project Phoenix' events are successfully deleted while other events remain intact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The list view or calendar view no longer shows any 'Project Phoenix' events, but other unrelated calendar events are still visible on the screen.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the deletions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed by clicking UI elements in the browser, not by typing database queries or curl commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent operated within a genuine web browser displaying the Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Chrome/Firefox) with the Odoo URL, rather than a text editor or mocked interface.

integrity.description: The agent specifically targeted the 'Project Phoenix' events for deletion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not use a 'select all' checkbox on an unfiltered list of all calendar events, which would violate the requirement to keep other events intact.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target string for the events to delete is 'Project Phoenix'. There are exactly 4 events to be deleted: 'Project Phoenix - Kickoff Meeting', 'Project Phoenix - Design Review', 'Project Phoenix - Sprint Planning', and 'Project Phoenix - Stakeholder Update'. The task requires preserving at least 90% of non-Phoenix events.
